INVOKE.COMMENT: to find the duration continuance as challengeLength

MAP.COMMENT: create comma seprated string of challenge codes

BRANCH.COMMENT: -- Check for status of SB Call --

MAP.COMMENT: --- increment from and to row nos. ---

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

BRANCH.COMMENT: --- Publish remaining challenges left in temp list ---

Values.value: Scheduler Service run successfully and published %successfulCount% records for Status Update, Future Challenge Period creation and Notification purpose.

Hi Team,
Scheduler Service run successfully and published %successfulCount% records for Status Update, Future Challenge Period creation and Notification purpose.
Regards, VE System.
Period Status Not Achieved scheduler successfully run for %region%[%Env%]

MAP.COMMENT: -- VE-1404 Map completeNumRecords --- Drop all unused variables --

INVOKE.COMMENT: -- Enable the Trigger for Error Queue --

Values.value: Period Status Not Achieved scheduler partially run for %region%[%Env%]

Hi Team,
Scheduler Service run partially by publishing %successfulCount% records for Status Update, Future Challenge Period creation and Notification purpose.
Then we have a failure with error as "%lastError/error%"
Complete Error Details ========================== %lastError/errorDump%
Regards, VE System.
Period Status Not Achieved scheduler unsuccessfully run for %region%[%Env%]

Hi Team,
We have a failure while running the scheduler service with error as "%lastError/error%"
Complete Error Details ========================== %lastError/errorDump%
Regards, VE System.
